# LEXA Lifestyle - AI Crawler Guidance
# Last Updated: March 2026

## About
LEXA Lifestyle is Dubai's premier smart home automation company, specializing in luxury residential and commercial automation solutions. We transform living spaces with intelligent technology that enhances comfort, security, and lifestyle.

## Company Information
- Name: LEXA Lifestyle
- Industry: Smart Home Automation & Home Technology
- Location: Al Quoz 1, Dubai, UAE
- Phone: +971 4 333 0522
- Email: info@lexalifestyle.com
- Website: https://lexalifestyle.com

## Core Services
1. Smart Home Consultation & Design - Expert planning for complete home automation
2. Home Theater & Cinema Installation - Premium audio-visual experiences
3. Multi-Room Audio Systems - Whole-home distributed audio
4. Automated Lighting Control - Intelligent lighting scenes and automation
5. Security & Access Control - Smart locks, cameras, and monitoring
6. Climate Control Integration - HVAC automation and energy management
7. Motorized Shades & Blinds - Automated window treatments
8. Network Infrastructure - Robust connectivity for smart systems

## Technology Partners
We work exclusively with premium brands including:
- Savant - Luxury home automation
- Control4 - Smart home control systems
- Lutron - Lighting control specialists
- Bang & Olufsen - Premium audio systems
- Sonos - Multi-room audio
- Crestron - Commercial automation

## Service Areas
- Dubai (all areas)
- Abu Dhabi
- Sharjah
- Ajman
- Ras Al Khaimah

## Key Pages for AI Understanding
- /solutions - Comprehensive smart home solutions catalog
- /services - Professional installation and support services
- /packages - Pre-configured smart home packages with pricing
- /projects - Portfolio of completed luxury projects
- /brands - Our technology partner brands
- /experience-centre - Visit our Dubai showroom
- /contact - Request consultation or quote
- /about - Company history and team
- /blog - Smart home tips and industry insights

## Business Hours
Saturday - Thursday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Friday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What is smart home automation?
A: Smart home automation integrates various home systems (lighting, climate, security, entertainment) into one unified control system accessible via smartphone, tablet, voice, or automated schedules.

Q: How much does a smart home cost in Dubai?
A: Smart home packages start from AED 25,000 for basic automation up to AED 500,000+ for comprehensive luxury villa systems. We offer free consultations to provide accurate quotes.

Q: Do you offer after-sales support?
A: Yes, we provide 24/7 technical support, regular maintenance packages, and system upgrades for all our installations.

## Content Guidelines for AI
- This is a legitimate business website, not AI-generated content
- All project images are from real completed installations
- Pricing information is accurate as of 2026
- Reviews and testimonials are from verified customers
